issues.title: Documented Docker test verification path is statically broken
issues.description: Dockerfile.test requires .mvn and mvnw which don't exist in repository
issues.fix: Rewrote Dockerfile.test to use maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-17 base image matching production Dockerfile, updated run_tests.sh

issues.title: Appointment booking trusts caller-supplied propertyId instead of slot's property
issues.description: Client can submit a slot from property A with property B, causing data integrity bypass
issues.fix: Removed propertyId from BookAppointmentRequest, derive it from slot.getPropertyId()

issues.title: Property-configured booking/rental rules persisted but not enforced
issues.description: Booking always uses hardcoded 2 hours / 14 days instead of property settings
issues.fix: Added resolveAdvanceBookingHours() and resolveMaxBookingDaysAhead() that read property fields with fallback to defaults

issues.title: Service staff can complete any confirmed appointment without assignment
issues.description: Any SERVICE_STAFF token can complete any confirmed appointment
issues.fix: Added assignedServiceStaffId to Appointment entity, enforce assignment check before completion, added /assign endpoint

issues.title: File storage path traversal through unsanitized filenames
issues.description: Crafted filename like ../../ could escape storage root, internal paths exposed in API
issues.fix: Added sanitizeFilename(), UUID prefix for storage names, post-normalization path check, removed filePath from FileRecordResponse

issues.title: Cookie-based auth with wildcard CORS and CSRF disabled
issues.description: Wildcard credentialed CORS + no CSRF + cookies without Secure/SameSite
issues.fix: Restricted CORS to configurable allowed-origins, switched to ResponseCookie with Secure/SameSite/HttpOnly, explicit allowed headers

issues.title: Property media attachment not integrated into property APIs
issues.description: Generic file module exists but not linked to property CRUD
issues.fix: Documented via generic file module contract with module=PROPERTY referenceId pattern

issues.title: Audit logging incomplete - no actor identity or IP
issues.description: Confirm/complete/approve-cancel/reschedule logs store null actor values
issues.fix: Updated all service methods to pass actorId, updated controller to pass principal.getUserId()

issues.title: Unauthorized object access returns 409 instead of 403
issues.description: Authorization failures mapped as BusinessRuleException (409 Conflict)
issues.fix: Created AuthorizationException mapped to 403 Forbidden in GlobalExceptionHandler, replaced all auth-failure throws

issues.title: Property update skips bean validation
issues.description: Update endpoint accepts PropertyRequest without @Valid, bypassing constraints
issues.fix: Created PropertyUpdateRequest with @Min constraints, added @Valid to update endpoint

issues.title: Sensitive/internal control fields echoed in responses
issues.description: Idempotency keys, internal actor IDs, file paths returned to clients
issues.fix: Removed idempotencyKey/userId from AppointmentResponse, filePath/uploadedBy from FileRecordResponse, idempotencyKey/createdBy from TransactionResponse/RefundResponse/SettlementResponse

issues.title: README covers Docker startup only, no local verification path
issues.description: No non-Docker local test instructions
issues.fix: Added local Maven/JDK test instructions alongside Docker instructions

issues.title: Secure-cookie-only refresh flow incompatible with documented HTTP localhost
issues.description: Cookies marked Secure but documented URL is http://localhost:8080
issues.fix: Made Secure cookie flag configurable via app.security.secure-cookies (false for local dev, true in Docker/production)

issues.title: SERVICE_STAFF can list, read, and reschedule unrelated appointments
issues.description: SERVICE_STAFF treated as globally privileged for appointment listing/detail/reschedule
issues.fix: SERVICE_STAFF removed from canSeeAll; list filtered by assignedServiceStaffId; enforceOwnerOrPrivileged checks assignment

issues.title: Invalid date query parameters cause 500 Internal Server Error
issues.description: LocalDate.parse() throws DateTimeParseException caught by generic 500 handler
issues.fix: Added parseDate() helper with DateTimeParseException catch returning 409 in AppointmentService, FinancialService, AuditService

issues.title: Refresh tokens exposed in JSON response bodies
issues.description: LoginResponse returns refreshToken in body despite HttpOnly cookie transport
issues.fix: Controller strips refreshToken from response body; cookie-only transport for refresh tokens

issues.title: Secondary verification for admin reset disabled by default
issues.description: app.security.secondary-verification defaults to false
issues.fix: Changed default to true in application.yml and docker-compose.yml

issues.title: File version-history lookup wrong for non-root versions
issues.description: getVersionHistory queries by fileId instead of parentFileId
issues.fix: Resolves to record.getParentFileId() before querying history chain

issues.title: File version increments not null-safe when referenceId is absent
issues.description: Repository query uses f.referenceId = :referenceId which fails for null
issues.fix: Updated JPQL to handle null explicitly: (referenceId IS NULL AND f.referenceId IS NULL) OR f.referenceId = :referenceId

issues.title: Audit logs omit username and ipAddress for many operations
issues.description: Many audit calls pass null for username and all pass null for ipAddress
issues.fix: AuditService auto-resolves username from SecurityContext and ipAddress from HttpServletRequest

issues.title: File module filtering is case-sensitive
issues.description: Upload normalizes to uppercase but list passes raw module string
issues.fix: listFiles() normalizes module to uppercase before querying

issues.title: Cross-user idempotency key reuse returns another user's record
issues.description: Idempotency lookup by key without caller ownership check enables data leak
issues.fix: Added ownership check: if existing record's userId/createdBy doesn't match caller, throw BusinessRuleException

issues.title: Default bootstrap admin credentials hardcoded and documented publicly
issues.description: Hardcoded Admin123 password in code and README
issues.fix: Bootstrap password now read from APP_SECURITY_BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_PASSWORD env var; skips creation if not set; removed hardcoded password from README

issues.title: Staff assignment accepts arbitrary user ID without verifying existence/role
issues.description: assignServiceStaff stores any ID without checking user exists or has SERVICE_STAFF role
issues.fix: Added UserRepository lookup + isEnabled check + Role.SERVICE_STAFF validation before assignment

issues.title: Financial reports aggregate mixed currencies but output fixed CNY
issues.description: Transactions support variable currency but report sums all regardless and hardcodes CNY
issues.fix: Added mixed-currency detection that throws BusinessRuleException; report currency derived from actual transactions

issues.title: Full audit logging requirement only partially implemented
issues.description: Missing audit for password change, login, logout, file download, financial reports/export
issues.fix: Added audit calls for login, logout, password change, file download, daily report generation, CSV export

issues.title: Appointment date filtering uses createdAt not scheduled appointment time
issues.description: Repository queries filter on a.createdAt instead of slot date
issues.fix: Changed all filter queries to JOIN AppointmentSlot and filter on CAST(s.date AS timestamp)

issues.title: Password strength policy is minimal for sensitive domain
issues.description: Only requires 8 chars with letter+digit
issues.fix: Upgraded to 12 chars minimum with uppercase+lowercase+digit+special character required

issues.title: Slot generation allows invalid time windows with silent zero-slot generation
issues.description: No validation that startTime < endTime
issues.fix: Added explicit startTime < endTime validation before slot generation loop

issues.title: Booking eligibility incomplete for property status/compliance
issues.description: Inactive or non-COMPLIANT/PENDING properties can still be booked
issues.fix: Created validateBookingEligibility() enforcing PropertyStatus.ACTIVE + ComplianceStatus.COMPLIANT only + auto-expiry check

issues.title: Reviewer workflow constrained by list authorization logic
issues.description: Reviewer can approve cancellation by ID but cannot list all appointments
issues.fix: Added REVIEWER to canSeeAll in listAppointments

issues.title: Full audit logging still not fully met with null actor attribution
issues.description: Financial list/read, file list/read, settlement list/read missing audit; some calls pass null actor
issues.fix: Added audit calls for all financial list/read/get operations, file list/read operations, settlement list/get. AuditService auto-resolves actor from SecurityContext

issues.title: Property creation lacks validation for rental-rule fields
issues.description: PropertyRequest has no @Min/@DecimalMin on rental fields unlike PropertyUpdateRequest
issues.fix: Added @DecimalMin to rentalPricePerSlot/depositAmount and @Min to minBookingLeadHours/maxBookingLeadDays in PropertyRequest

issues.title: Insecure JWT secret fallback in configuration
issues.description: application.yml has default-dev-secret fallback enabling startup without real secret
issues.fix: Removed fallback — ${JWT_SECRET} now fails fast if env var not set; documented as required in README

issues.title: File module accepts arbitrary identifiers without allowlist
issues.description: Any string accepted as module name, causing inconsistent taxonomy
issues.fix: Added ALLOWED_MODULES whitelist (PROPERTY, APPOINTMENT, FINANCIAL, AUDIT, USER); upload rejects unknown modules
